title: Simplest Compression
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6e73b73177e2cff7f99d1d235c610729982ad38.png)
# About This mod is designed to relieve your warehouses from the huge amount of junk storage blocks, now you can compress them! Now your storage will be ready to accept 9 times more resources! ## Features - Increased hardness and blast resistance of compressed blocks - Fancy vanilla-like textures ## Translations: This mod has translations in **English | Russian** languages. ## Content This mod in last version adds more than 90 compressed versions of vanilla blocks. ## FAQ **Q:** Can I use this mod into my modpack?\ **A:** Yes! **Q:** Will you make a Fabric port?\ **A:** No, we don't have such plans now. **Q:** Will you make a backport?\ **A:** Nope, we prefer to keep our attention to the latest versions. **Q:** Does this work on X version?\ **A:** Try it and see! If it does, please comment so I can mark it. **Q:** Do you have a Patreon, or similar means of supporting your work?\ **A:** We have [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/teamsolar) if you want to support work of our team.
